fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the return shipment.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program fills in this field automatically and uses it to keep track of the return shipment lines.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where items on the line are placed.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the posting group that was used when this return shipment line was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Posting Group field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the name of, or a description of, the item, general ledger account, or item charge.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item, general ledger account, or item charge specified on the line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT percentage that was used on the credit memo or purchase document.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT % field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents in this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line discount percentage granted on items on each individual line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Line Discount % field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the price, in local currency, for one unit of the item.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Unit Price (LCY) field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the return shipment line could have been included in an invoice discount calculation.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Allow Invoice Disc. field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Item Shpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the item ledger entry associated with the return shipment line.
The program creates this number when the line is posted. The number is not displayed anywhere else in the program.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.
Item Tracking
If the return shipment line carries multiple unique item tracking numbers when posted, this will result in one item ledger entry for each item tracking number. For such one-to-many relations, the Item Entry Relation table manages the relation to the item ledger entries in stead of the Item Shpt. Entry No. field.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the indirect cost that has been allocated to this item ledger entry through the indirect cost percentage.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Indirect Cost % field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Vendor Item No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies either the vendor's item number for the item or the item number that you assigned to the item in your Item table.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Vendor Item No. field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the general business posting group that was used when this return shipment line was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general product posting group code that is assigned to the items on this line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field in the Item table, the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field in the G/L Account table, the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field in the FA Ledger Entry table or the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field in the Item Charge table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type was used when this line was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Calculation Type field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the original purchase line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transaction Type field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the original purchase line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transport Method field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

The field contains an extended text line number if you have attached one to the original purchase line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Attached to Line No. field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Entry Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of entry where the items pass into your country/region.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Entry Point field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used for the items in this line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Area field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction specification of the original purchase line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transaction Specification field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the vendor.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Tax Area Code field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the purchase from the vendor was liable to sales tax.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Tax Liable field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the tax group of the item.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Tax Group Code field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Use Tax
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the tax type for the entry is use tax.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Use Tax field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the vendor.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT product posting group of the item, general ledger account, fixed asset or item charge.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on this line.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order that the record originates from.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line that the record originates from.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total net amount (amount excluding VAT) of this return line.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the unit cost of the item on the line. The unit cost is in the currency of the purchase transaction.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date the purchase header was posted.
The program copies the date from the Posting Date field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the posting date because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the job task that is associated with the return shipment line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity per unit of measure for the item.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Qty. per Unit of Measure field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity of the item expressed in base units of measure.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Return Qty. to Ship (Base) field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Qty. Invoiced (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the quantity on the line has been invoiced. The quantity in this field is expressed in base units of measure.
The program automatically fills in this field by converting the contents of the Quantity Invoiced field into base units of measure.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the FA posting date of the return shipment line. The field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset.
The program copies the contents of this field from the FA Posting Date field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: FA Posting Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the FA posting type of the return shipment line. The field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset.
The program copies the contents of this field from the FA Posting Type field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the depreciation book code on the return shipment line. The field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Depreciation Book Code field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Salvage Value
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the salvage value on the return shipment line. The field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Salvage Value field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Depr. until FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
This field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset. The field indicates whether depreciation was calculated until the FA posting date of the line. If the field contains a check mark, depreciation for the asset was posted for the period from the FA posting date of the previous FA ledger entry to the FA posting date of this return shipment line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Depr. until FA Posting Date field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Depr. Acquisition Cost
fields.tooltip:
This field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset. The field indicates whether, when this line was posted, the additional acquisition cost posted on the line was depreciated by proportionately the amount as that which the fixed asset had already been depreciated by.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Depr. Acquisition Cost
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Maintenance Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the maintenance code on the return shipment line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Maintenance Code field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Insurance No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the insurance number on the return shipment line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Insurance No. field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Budgeted FA No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the budgeted Fixed Assets number on the return shipment line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Budgeted FA No. field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Duplicate in Depreciation Book
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the second depreciation book code if the return shipment line was posted to two separate depreciation books. The Depreciation Book Code field specifies the first depreciation book code.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Duplicate in Depreciation Book field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Use Duplication List
fields.tooltip:
This field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset. The field contains a check mark if the purchase line was posted to all depreciation books that use different journal batches and have a check mark in the Part of Duplication List field in the Depreciation Book table.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Use Duplication List field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves this vendor.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Responsibility Center field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Item Category Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the item category code for the item in this return shipment line.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this item is a catalog item.

fields.name: Purchasing Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the purchasing code for the item.
The purchasing code indicates a step that needs to be taken to purchase the item on the return shipment line. The codes are set up in the Purchasing table.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Purchasing Code field in the Purchase Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Return Qty. Shipped Not Invd.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the returned item that has been posted as shipped but that has not yet been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Item Charge Base Amount
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Suggests item charge assignment by amount.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry as a corrective entry. You can use the field if you need to post a corrective entry to an account.

fields.name: Return Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the return order number this line is associated with.

fields.name: Return Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related return order line.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.
